title: BC Dev Toolset Local Settings
description: Developer-local BC Dev Toolset settings stored in .bcdevtoolset/settings.json.

licenseFile.description: Path to the Business Central license file.

certificateFile.description: Path to the certificate file used by local operations.

packageOutputPath.description: Path where generated packages are written.

assemblyProbingPathsRoot.description: Host folder where Service and .NET assemblies are extracted from containers for on-prem AL apps. Extraction prefers Microsoft.NETCore.App.Ref and falls back to the Microsoft.NETCore.App shared runtime. Relative paths are resolved from the workspace root.

dependenciesPath.description: Deprecated legacy single path containing app dependency packages. Use dependenciesPaths instead.

dependenciesPaths.description: Paths containing dependency packages. Each entry can be a folder or a .zip file containing .app files.

pageScriptTestResultsPath.description: Path where page script test results are written.

pageScriptTestHeaded.description: Whether page script tests should run headed.

executeTestsInContainerName.description: Optional container name used by Test operations. A non-empty local value takes priority over the shared workspace setting.

sqlBackupPath.errorMessage: Field "sqlBackupPath" has moved. Set it inside each relevant "configurations" entry.

configurations.description: Developer-local Business Central target configuration overrides.

autoUpdateLaunchJson.description: Optional override for whether update launch.json operations include this configuration. Applies to all server types. When omitted, the effective value is true for Dev targets and false otherwise.

databaseUser.description: Optional SQL user for database operations.

databasePassword.description: Optional SQL password for database operations.

container.description: Docker container name for Container targets.

multitenant.description: Explicit multitenant mode passed to New-BcContainer. When omitted, Create Docker container infers the mode from a compatible backup set; if the backup does not determine the mode, the parameter is omitted and BcContainerHelper decides. Creation aborts when an explicit value conflicts with the backup type.

includeTestToolkit.description: Whether container environments should include the test toolkit.

sqlBackupPath.description: Path used for SQL backup files for this Container configuration.

admin.deprecationMessage: Field "admin" is obsolete and will be removed in the next major release. Use "bcUser" instead.
admin.markdownDeprecationMessage: Field `admin` is obsolete and will be removed in the next major release. Use `bcUser` instead.

password.deprecationMessage: Field "password" is obsolete and will be removed in the next major release. Use "bcPassword" instead.
password.markdownDeprecationMessage: Field `password` is obsolete and will be removed in the next major release. Use `bcPassword` instead.

network.description: Optional Docker network passed to New-BcContainer for Container targets. Known network names are verified and missing creatable networks are created with the matching Docker driver; custom network names are allowed and are not managed by the toolset.

hostIP.description: Optional host.containerhelper.internal IP address passed to New-BcContainer.

updateHosts.description: Whether New-BcContainer should update the host machine's hosts file. Defaults to true when omitted.

macAddress.description: Optional container MAC address passed to New-BcContainer. Use only with a transparent network.

IP.description: Optional static container IP address passed to New-BcContainer. Use only with a transparent network; leave empty when the network should assign an address.

dns.description: Optional DNS value passed to New-BcContainer. Use only with a transparent network. BcContainerHelper recognizes HostDNS; explicit DNS server values are also allowed.

autoExtractAssemblies.description: Whether Service and .NET assemblies are extracted automatically after this container is built. Manual extraction ignores this setting.

autoRestoreBackup.description: Whether Create Docker container and Test operations automatically restore a compatible SQL backup set from sqlBackupPath. Defaults to true when omitted. Manual restore operations ignore this setting.

tenant.description: Tenant identifier for Cloud or OnPrem targets.
Tenant identifier for Cloud or OnPrem targets.

server.errorMessage: Field "server" is not valid when "serverType" is not "OnPrem".

serverInstance.errorMessage: Field "serverInstance" is not valid when "serverType" is not "OnPrem".

port.errorMessage: Field "port" is not valid when "serverType" is not "OnPrem".

container.errorMessage: Field "container" is not valid when "serverType" is not "Container".

includeTestToolkit.errorMessage: Field "includeTestToolkit" is not valid when "serverType" is not "Container".

multitenant.errorMessage: Field "multitenant" is not valid when "serverType" is not "Container".

bcUser.errorMessage: Field "bcUser" is not valid when "serverType" is not "Container".

bcPassword.errorMessage: Field "bcPassword" is not valid when "serverType" is not "Container".

sqlBackupPath.errorMessage: Field "sqlBackupPath" is not valid when "serverType" is not "Container".

admin.errorMessage: Field "admin" is not valid when "serverType" is not "Container".

password.errorMessage: Field "password" is not valid when "serverType" is not "Container".

autoExtractAssemblies.errorMessage: Field "autoExtractAssemblies" is not valid when "serverType" is not "Container".

autoRestoreBackup.errorMessage: Field "autoRestoreBackup" is not valid when "serverType" is not "Container".

environmentType.errorMessage: Field "environmentType" is not valid when "serverType" is not "Container" or "Cloud".

environmentName.errorMessage: Field "environmentName" is not valid when "serverType" is not "Cloud".

tenant.errorMessage: Field "tenant" is not valid when "serverType" is not "Cloud" or "OnPrem".

authentication.errorMessage: Field "authentication" is not valid when "serverType" is not "Container" or "OnPrem".
